scripts.db:check:persistence: tsc -p tsconfig.seed.json && node -e "const Module=require('module');const path=require('path');const old=Module._resolveFilename;Module._resolveFilename=function(req,parent,isMain,opts){if(req.startsWith('@/')) return old.call(this,path.join('/private/tmp/okr-seed-build',req.slice(2)),parent,isMain,opts);return old.call(this,req,parent,isMain,opts)};process.env.NODE_PATH='./node_modules';Module._initPaths();require('/private/tmp/okr-seed-build/scripts/check-persistence.js');"
scripts.db:verify: npm run db:check && npm run db:check:persistence && npm run db:check:basic-api
scripts.runtime:check: npm run env:check && npm run db:check
scripts.deploy:check: npm run runtime:check && npm run build
scripts.verify:after-update: npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:local
